title: docs(sprints): close CI-RED-015-L — IBG sandbox landmark intake bridge
intent: SPRINTS.md ledger-only update: add a CLOSED row for CI-RED-015-L to the CI-RED-015 bucket table. 015-L is the additive IBG sandbox landmark candidate intake bridge (dev-ready scope, not a failing-test cluster), shipped and merged as #178 (869384c2). Documentation only; no product/application/CI-behavior change. First per-PR manifest authored under .cbsp21/patches/ per the #184 mechanism.

diff_articulation.what_changed: SPRINTS.md: insert one row into the CI-RED-015 bucket table (between 015-H and the 015-F umbrella tail) recording 015-L as CLOSED by #178 (869384c2). The row documents that the sandbox landmark candidate adapter imports vectorizer-sandbox ibg-landmark-candidate.v1 records as review-required, fail-closed BodyEvidenceCandidates (evidence geometry, not authority: no mm calibration, no solver landmarks, no IBG-memory, no export authority), the default intake gate rejects them as intended (AUTHORITY_INSUFFICIENT + REVIEW_REQUIRED), and the in-PR review hardening (ba16d594: authority_state->geometry_authority_class metadata rename, namespaced sandbox review flag, semantic validation). CI-RED-015 top-line status is unchanged (stays OPEN; other buckets remain open).
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: N/A - behavior_change is none (documentation / ledger only).
